javadoc_after:
/** * Estimates the size (memory representation) of Java objects. *

* This class uses assumptions that were discovered for the Hotspot * virtual machine. If you use a non-OpenJDK/Oracle-based JVM, * the measurements may be slightly wrong. * * @see #shallowSizeOf(Object) * @see #shallowSizeOfInstance(Class) * * @lucene.internal */
